description_for_human: Order traditional cakes and desserts from HappyCake in Sugar Land, TX. The original taste of happiness.
description_for_model: API for browsing and ordering cakes from HappyCake US bakery in Sugar Land, TX. Use /api/agents/catalog to see products with live prices, /api/agents/availability to check kitchen capacity for a date, and POST /api/agents/order-intent to place orders. Always check availability before ordering. Prices are in cents. Standard items need 24h advance notice. Custom cakes require owner consultation.
